expectations.text: A0: Output file exists with real content
expectations.evidence: workflow-order.md is 176 lines, contains a 10-step generic software development workflow in German

expectations.text: A1: quality-scenarios is mentioned/included in the workflow
expectations.evidence: No mention of 'quality-scenarios' anywhere in the file. The workflow has generic steps like 'Qualitaetssicherung' (step 9) but no dedicated quality-scenarios skill or artifact

expectations.text: A2: quality-scenarios comes AFTER architecture-style-selection and BEFORE feature-design
expectations.evidence: N/A -- baseline has no knowledge of superflowers skills, so ordering of skill-specific steps cannot be evaluated

expectations.text: A3: quality-scenarios.md is referenced as an artifact
expectations.evidence: No reference to quality-scenarios.md. Artifacts listed are generic: Anforderungsdokument, Domain-Modell, OpenAPI-Spezifikation, ADRs, etc.

expectations.text: A4: Test-type categorization from quality-scenarios flows into output
expectations.evidence: No test-type categorization (unit-test, integration-test, load-test, etc.) appears anywhere. Testing is mentioned generically in steps 7 and 9 without categorization by quality scenario type
